pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 137 creates document at this exact path
export_result.sh and verifier.py both reference this path
setup_task.sh creates paragraphs with exact text at lines 43, 62, 104, 123. Verified by creating test document.
verifier.py line 78 checks 'if num_sections >= 3' indicating 3 sections is the minimum requirement for task completion
setup_task.sh line 69 creates table with 'cols=10' and headers array has 10 items. Verified by creating and parsing test document.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic facilities maintenance document with a wide 10-column equipment schedule table. The draft document is generated programmatically with four required section headings: Introduction, Equipment Schedule, Maintenance Procedures, and Emergency Contacts. The document contains references to real industry standards (ASHRAE 180-2018, BOMA International, OSHA 29 CFR 1910.147) but all facility and personnel data are synthetic (Meridian Tower Office Complex, fake equipment IDs, fake service providers, fake phone numbers). The task requires creating at least 3 section breaks to enable landscape orientation for the wide table section while keeping narrative sections in portrait mode.
